query: UPDATE phases SET title = 'Celestial Secrets', description = 'Phase 3A documents the conduit consciousness period. The artist has moved from "creating" to "channeling." The work becomes a receiver for cosmic signals. Gnosticism (VALIS), Sci-Fi (Philip K. Dick), Pink Floyd references, Physics-as-Spirituality. The moiré interference patterns create "shimmer" or "signal noise." Most works are vertical "stacks" or "towers" (receivers/antennae).\n\nKey Exhibition: "Celestial Secrets" - Bangkok, 2023' WHERE code = 'PH3A';
